name: Yangzhou Chenhua New Material Co., Ltd.
summary: Yangzhou Chenhua New Material Co., Ltd. engages in the research, production, and sale of chemicals in China. The company's products include organophosphorus flame retardants; alkyl polyglucoside, polyether, amine-terminated polyether, and silicone oil; high temperature vulcanized silicone rubber and room temperature vulcanized silicone rubber; and waterborne polyurethane resins, rare earth organic red fluorescence materials, amino alcohol, and polyether amine. The company was founded in 1995 and is headquartered in Baoying, China.
